caption: A person's hands open a cardboard box of 2020 Topps baseball cards. The box is navy blue and white, featuring the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" in large letters and "2020" in a smaller font. A picture of a baseball player wearing a New York Yankees cap is printed on the box. The action takes place on a dark surface with a red and white banner at the bottom that reads "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS". In a small picture-in-picture window in the corner, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap watches the process. As the sequence progresses, the hands lift the top flap and then fully open the box to reveal the contents inside. The Topps logo is visible on the side of the packaging. The setting appears to be an indoor studio environment designed for card breaking.
